how_computed: Percentage of gold (operation x documented-code) cases where the agent's observed actual_code equals the gold actual_code. A case the agent did not cover (no descriptor produced / not sent) counts as a mismatch. Denominator = all testable gold cases.
rationale: All four agents hit the same local API, so the raw Status Code Accuracy Rate is a property of the API, not the agent. Fidelity-to-gold instead measures each framework's test quality: full matrix coverage, correct per-code request construction (drop a required field for 400, omit auth for 401, swap the id for 404, malformed token for 500, route hook codes), and faithful recording of the real code. The headline status_code_accuracy_rate_pct is still emitted by every agent as the task's QA finding (DummyJSON < 100% because several /add endpoints document 400 but return 201).
